case_title: AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES-BDC VS MILLER, SALLY E.

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT SUBMITTED ON SEPT. 4, 1998.
NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT TO SALLY E.MILLER RETURNED WITH HER WRITTEN RESPONSE FILED;
RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ON CASE 481049 FILED BY PLAINTIFF AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES-BDC AS TO DEFENDANT MILLER, SALLY E.
COPIES OF APPLICATION AND NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT SENT TO DEFT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES-BDC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MILLER, SALLY E. $1,529.00 PRINCIPAL, $1,525.65 INTEREST, $14.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,068.65, RENEWAL OF JUDGEMENT ON CASE NO. 481049. JUDGMENT ENTERED 9/8/88. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
